calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Special Appearance by David Ratner, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Dismissal on file. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Pursuant To C.C.P. 418.10(A)(1) For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction; Declaration Of Geoffrey L. Warner
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Geoffrey Warner, Esq. (310-282-2514) of Thompson Coburn LLP for Defendant INDUSTRIAS MATEU.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant reports notice to other side re: appearance to contest this morning. The Court announces the key issue. Defendant argues, cites case and doctrine. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT INDUSTRIAS MATEU, S.A.'s Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Pursuant To C.C.P. 418.10(A)(1) For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction is Granted. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

*After the hearing, at 10:09 am, David Pillemer Esq., Counsel for Plaintiff State Farm General Insurance appears telephonically. Counsel is informed of the Court's ruling and that an order has been signed.*

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
